title: Text Interaction Test Mission
intro: A text-only test mission for prompt, branch, hint, back, and multi-answer behavior.

steps.title: Text Test Start
steps.text:
This mission tests text interactions only. No GPS, distance, signal, or location checks are required.

Type READY to begin.
Type HINT to test a hint response.

responses.hint: Hints show status text but do not advance unless a goto is configured.

steps.title: Branch Choice Test
steps.text:
Choose a route to test.

Type 1 for the quote verification route.
Type 2 for the simple passcode route.
Type BACK to return to the start.

steps.title: Multi-Answer Quote Test
steps.text:
This tests the new multi-answer prompt.

Type READY to start quote verification.
Type BACK to return to the branch choice.

Verify any two of these three test quotes:

THE FIRST SIGNAL IS GREEN
THE SECOND MARKER IS SILENT
THE THIRD DOOR OPENS NORTH

multiAnswer.readyMessage: Quote verification is ready. Submit one quote at a time.
multiAnswer.noMatchMessage: No quote matched. Check spelling and try again, or type BACK.
multiAnswer.completeMessage: Enough quotes verified. Advancing to the final confirmation.

inputs: THE THIRD DOOR OPENS TO THE NORTH

steps.title: Simple Passcode Test
steps.text:
This tests a normal single-answer prompt.

Type ALPHA to pass.
Type HINT to display a hint.
Type BACK to return to the branch choice.

steps.title: Final Confirmation
steps.text:
Final text interaction check.

Type PASS to finish with the success ending.
Type FAIL to finish with the failure ending.
Type BACK to return to the branch choice.

steps.title: Text Test Passed
steps.text: The text interaction test reached the success ending.

steps.title: Text Test Failed Path
steps.text: The text interaction test reached the failure ending. This confirms failure branches work too.
